name: Rocky Road Candy (Mw)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate candy coating and shortening in a single layer in a large casserole dish.
2. Microwave on medium (50%) for 3 to 5 minutes, or until pieces are soft. Stir after 3 minutes.
3. Add peanuts, then gently stir in the marshmallows using as few strokes as possible.
4. Spread mixture onto waxpaper placed on a cookie sheet. Spread to almost a 9 inch square.
5. Allow to cool until firm.
6. Cut into 1 inch squares.
7. Store in air-tight containers.
